metadata.description: Empowering Mongolian youth through creative volunteerism, education, and community impact.

EventsPage.newsletterDesc: Get notified about new volunteering opportunities and social impact initiatives via email.

LessonsPage.heroDesc: Courses designed to build your skills, knowledge and cultural understanding for our volunteering programs.
LessonsPage.noLessons: No lessons available at the moment.

BeforeLoginNews.subheader: Welcome to Volunteer Center Mongolia! We make your path easier than ever before.
BeforeLoginNews.simple_desc: Our system guides you step-by-step through your application with smart hints.
BeforeLoginNews.flex_desc: Manage your profile on mobile, tablet, or PC – at your own pace.
BeforeLoginNews.security_desc: State-of-the-art encryption and strict data protection to keep your info safe.
BeforeLoginNews.free_desc: Registration is 100% free. It only becomes binding upon successful placement.

HeroSlider.slide1_desc: Make a meaningful impact by providing home-visit care and psychosocial support to children with special needs. Join a dedicated team of volunteers committed to bringing joy to families who need it most.
HeroSlider.slide2_desc: Share your knowledge and inspire the next generation through online tutoring. We offer passionate high school students and young adults the platform to teach Math, English, and more, helping children succeed academically.
HeroSlider.slide3_desc: Step up as a leader by planning, organizing, and managing impactful community events. V-Club is the creative force behind our initiatives, offering you the perfect opportunity to build project management skills while making a difference.

UsSection.hero_desc: Empowering Mongolia through creative volunteerism since 2007.
UsSection.content: Since 2007, the Mongolian Volunteer Center has pursued the noble goal of building a humane, democratic society through creative volunteerism. We have successfully implemented over 50 national projects focused on education, child protection, and sustainable livelihoods, creating and scaling model volunteer programs.
UsSection.val1_desc: Driven by the passion and dedication of volunteers at our core.
UsSection.val2_desc: Creating global change through impactful local action and partnership.
UsSection.val3_desc: Strengthening bonds to build more resilient and supportive communities.
UsSection.val4_desc: Infusing genuine passion and care into everything we undertake.

Marketplace.title: Explore Academy
Marketplace.subtitle: Browse available courses, workshops, and exclusive access passes for our VCM community.
Marketplace.item1_desc: Intensive skill-building workshop for new volunteers.
Marketplace.item2_desc: Annual membership to exclusive volunteer networking events.
Marketplace.item3_desc: One-on-one career guidance from community leaders.
Marketplace.item4_desc: Essentials for your first volunteer project.

WhyChooseUs.desc: We combine heartfelt care with high standards to give you the most rewarding volunteering experience.
WhyChooseUs.card1_desc: Discover diverse opportunities including local volunteer events and flagship programs like EDU-Volunteer, AND, and V-Club.
WhyChooseUs.card2_desc: Our team is always ready to guide you through your volunteer journey.
WhyChooseUs.card3_desc: Empowering communities through impactful volunteer work and shared local experiences.
WhyChooseUs.card4_desc: Strict vetting process for every partner. Your safety and trust are our priorities.
WhyChooseUs.card5_desc: It's free to join our community.

metadata.title: Contact Us | Volunteer Center Mongolia
metadata.description: Get in touch with our experts for any questions about our volunteering programs.

ContactPage.heroDesc: Make a difference today. We are here to help you every step of the way.

address.label: Visit Us
address.value: Sukhbaatar street-Baga Toiruu, Tsetsee Gun office, 300A#

ContactPage.formDesc: Have a question? We will respond within 24 hours.

metadata.title: AND Program | Community Care | VCM
metadata.description: Provide psychosocial support to children with special needs through our home-visit volunteer program.

hero.title: Community
hero.sub: Make a meaningful impact by providing psychosocial support to children with special needs. Join a dedicated team of volunteers committed to bringing joy to families who need it most.

info.title: About AND Program
info.desc: The AND Program focuses on home-visit care, providing essential support to families with children who have special needs. Our volunteers help create inclusive environments and offer much-needed respite and emotional support.

metadata.title: EDU-Volunteer | Education Support | VCM
metadata.description: Inspire the next generation by volunteering in schools and learning centers. Share your knowledge and skills.

hero.title: Inspire the
hero.sub: Share your knowledge and skills by volunteering at schools and learning centers. Empower young minds and build a brighter future together through education and mentorship.

info.title: About EDU-Volunteer
info.desc: EDU-Volunteer connects passionate individuals with educational institutions. Whether teaching a language, art, or technology, your contribution helps bridge educational gaps and inspires students to reach their full potential.

metadata.title: V-Club | Global Volunteer Community | VCM
metadata.description: Join our vibrant community of change-makers. Connect, collaborate, and create lasting social impact.

hero.title: Join the
hero.sub: Connect with fellow volunteers, share experiences, and collaborate on large-scale social initiatives. V-Club is where passion meets collective action for a better world.

info.title: About V-Club
info.desc: V-Club is the heart of our volunteer network. It's a platform for networking, skill-sharing, and organizing community-driven projects. Members gain access to exclusive workshops, leadership training, and international networking opportunities.

metadata.title: About Us | Volunteer Center Mongolia
metadata.description: Learn about our mission to empower youth through volunteering and community action.

About.intro: We create opportunities for Mongolian youth through volunteering, fostering global citizenship and personal growth.
About.storyP1: Founded with a vision to connect Mongolian youth with local and global opportunities, we have grown into the nation's premier volunteering agency.
About.storyP2: Our journey is defined by the thousands of lives transformed through community service, skill-building, and lasting friendships.
About.card1_text: We operate with full transparency and ethical standards in every program.
About.card2_text: Commited to providing the highest quality support for our volunteers.
About.card3_text: Building a supportive network that lasts far beyond the project duration.
About.card4_text: Fostering personal and professional development through volunteerism.
